---
name: Methodology Feedback
about: Report gaps, failure modes, or improvements discovered in practice
title: "[FEEDBACK] "
labels: methodology
assignees: ''
---

## Feedback

### Which SPECTRA phase or concept?
<!-- e.g., Explore phase, Confidence Gating, INVEST validation -->

### What happened?
<!-- Describe what you tried and what the outcome was -->

### What did you expect?
<!-- What should have happened according to the methodology? -->

### Suggested improvement
<!-- Optional: How would you change the methodology? -->

### Evidence
<!-- Any data, examples, or research that supports this feedback? -->
